concerns.text: Tasks T006, T007, and T022 reference incorrect project paths ('projects/PROJ-llmxive-follow-up-extending-efficientrol' missing '881-'). This breaks the traceability to the spec's defined project structure and may cause file system errors during implementation.

Task T026 explicitly mandates 'NO GLMM/random intercepts', directly contradicting the plan.md which selected 'Mixed-Effects Logistic Regression (GLMM)' as the core methodology. The spec FR-004 allows pooling OR continuous covariates, but the plan committed to GLMM. This task prevents satisfying the plan's chosen approach for FR-004.

Task T029 requires calculating FDR and comparing against alpha to verify SC-005, but SC-005 specifically requires measuring FDR *after* applying multiple-comparison correction (FR-006). The task description conflates the calculation of FDR with the verification of the correction's effect, potentially missing the requirement to actually apply the correction (Bonferroni/BH) before the FDR check.

Task T001 lists directory creation for 'projects/PROJ-881-llmxive-follow-up-extending-efficientrol/code/contracts/' but the plan.md and spec.md define contracts in 'specs/001-.../contracts/'. The task path for contracts is inconsistent with the plan's defined structure.
